info.prompt:
anime art of a breathtakingly candid portrait of a 14-year-old teen girl standing in a wild mountainous landscape, her fair complexion kissed by the diffused morning light. Her chestnut brown hair clings in delicate strands around her shoulders, partially obscuring her delicate expression as she raises one hand to adjust a loose strand. She wears a vibrant pink fitted sundress with scattered daisy patterns, the fabric belted snugly at her waist with a matching sash. Beneath her bare feet, the wildflower-strewn patch crumbles softly, surrounded by gnarled shrubs and framed by distant peaks under a sky of crystalline blue. The mood is unapologetically rustic, with organic textures dominating every inch of the scene. A single butterfly flits past her shoulder, adding a fleeting moment of life to the composition., world-class masterpiece, 4k, best quality, anime art.

Overall, it's an absolute world-class masterpiece anime-inspired artwork. It's an aesthetically pleasing anime art with impeccable attention to detail and beautiful composition.
